intentSynonyms: get a home timeline in x
look up a home timeline in x
fetch a single home timeline in x
view one specific home timeline in x
get home timeline tweets in x
description: Get tweets from the authenticated user's home timeline (For You feed). Returns the most recent tweets. Use cursor for pagination.

count.description: Number of tweets to return (default 20, max 40)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
